About Alex Miller

  1. Home
  2. About
Licensed Auctioneer & REALTOR®

Meet Alex Miller

Alex Miller is a licensed real estate auctioneer and REALTOR® with deep roots in central Kansas. Alex has built a reputation for running competitive, transparent auctions that deliver real results for sellers throughout the region.

With a background in [], Alex brings both professional expertise and a genuine understanding of what Kansas landowners and homeowners need. Whether you’re settling an estate, transitioning a farm, or looking to sell a home on a clear timeline, Alex provides the guidance and execution to make it happen.

Alex operates under the brokerage of L2 Realty Inc., ensuring every transaction is backed by a licensed Kansas real estate brokerage with the full resources to close smoothly.

  • Kansas Licensed Real Estate Auctioneer
  • Licensed Kansas REALTOR®
  • Brokered by L2 Realty Inc.

Backed by a Full Brokerage

Brokered by L2 Realty Inc.

Every transaction Alex handles is brokered through L2 Realty Inc., a licensed Kansas real estate brokerage. This means buyers and sellers benefit from the full legal and professional framework of a licensed brokerage — not just an independent auctioneer.

L2 Realty Inc. provides the brokerage structure, compliance oversight, and support systems that ensure every closing goes smoothly and every party is protected throughout the process.

L2 Realty Inc.
Licensed Kansas Real Estate Brokerage

Alex Miller is a licensed real estate auctioneer serving central Kansas. Every auction is handled with transparency, professionalism, and a commitment to getting sellers the best possible outcome.
